name: langchain-learning-path
description: A chapter-based LangChain learning site built with VitePress.

scripts.ci:check: npm run ci:lint && npm run ci:docs && npm run ci:examples
scripts.lint: npm run lint:md && npm run lint:py
scripts.lint:py: python3 -m ruff check . && python3 -m ruff format --check .
scripts.format: python3 -m ruff check . --fix && python3 -m ruff format .
